session.title: BN Cleanup + Phase Updates + volume_updates Pipeline
session.summary: Fixed BN-14 (renderTextField min/step), BN-15 (3 missing CSS classes). Added volume_updates to snippet pipeline. Updated current_phase for SEP Invoicing and Codex. Confirmed BN-4 and BN-6 already resolved.
decisions: BN-4 resolved — all status CSS classes already exist
BN-6 resolved — renderCurrentView has renderDashboard() fallback
BN-14 fixed — renderTextField renders min and step from options
BN-15 fixed — 3 missing CSS classes: cx-error-message, cx-missing, cx-search-results
volume_updates added to snippet pipeline — same pattern as canon_updates/todo_updates
session.handoff: All BN items resolved. Snippet pipeline now supports volume_updates. Next: feature work or cross-project docs push.

patch.current_phase: Phase 8D in progress — Desktop mode. Stats + History rework complete.
Post-Phase 5. BN cleanup done. All content backfilled.
